mapper.select: SELECT id, `user-id`, receiver, phone, `address-detail`, `is-default`, `create-time` FROM t_address
SELECT id, `user-id`, receiver, phone, `address-detail`, `is-default`, `create-time` FROM t_address WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, `user-id`, receiver, phone, `address-detail`, `is-default`, `create-time` FROM t_address WHERE `user-id` = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_address (`user-id`, receiver, phone, `address-detail`, `is-default`, `create-time`) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiver}, #{phone}, #{addressDetail}, #{isDefault}, #{createTime})
